subject: fix(ui): add missing useEffect import, revert DebugPill to inline styles
body:
Two bugs caught in code review:

1. SaveLoadModal was missing useEffect import — would crash at runtime
   when the save tab tried to focus the input field.

2. DebugPill badges used DaisyUI badge classes, but DebugPill renders
   in a separate React root without data-theme — DaisyUI color tokens
   don't resolve. Reverted to inline styles (consistent with the rest
   of DebugPill which already uses inline styles).

Tags: bugfix, modal, debug
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
